question: What warranty do you offer?
answer: We stand behind every project we build. MTC Renovations provides a workmanship warranty on all completed projects. If any defect related to our work or installation is identified after completion, we return to correct it at no charge. Material warranties are passed through from manufacturers (flooring, cabinets, fixtures, etc.) and we help you register those on your behalf where applicable. We have been building in Hamilton and Burlington for years — our reputation depends on standing behind our work, and we take that seriously.
